visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with her hair in a top-knot bun, wearing a white zip-up sweater, sits at a white desk in front of a bright yellow wall. She looks at the camera with a neutral expression as large text overlays appear. (2) A square logo for 7-Eleven appears in the center. The woman speaks and points toward the camera while maintaining a focused gaze. (3) A logo for FamilyMart appears. The woman smiles and gestures with her hands as if explaining something. (4) A logo for Hi-Life appears. The woman looks surprised and then breaks into a wide smile. (5) A different version of the 7-Eleven logo with a green checkmark appears. The woman smiles brightly, showing her teeth. (6) The video transitions to a pink-filtered dreamlike scene with heart graphics. The woman makes a heart shape with her hands in front of the FamilyMart logo. (7) A LINE logo with a green checkmark appears. The woman rests her chin on her hands, looking expectant. (8) A Nokia logo appears. The woman laughs loudly and points towards the camera. (9) A scene showing a green pedestrian traffic light appears. The woman points forward with a determined look. (10) An image of a yellow garbage truck appears. The woman looks focused and makes a small hand gesture. (11) A photo of an EasyCard being tapped at a metro gate appears. The woman gestures excitedly. (12) An image of MRT doors appears. The woman has her hands under her chin in a thoughtful pose. (13) An image of a Taiwan High-Speed Rail train appears. The woman smiles confidently. (14) The woman leans in close to the camera, gesturing toward the viewer as final call-to-action text appears on the yellow background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 今天考你喔. [Slogan]: 台灣人一定聽過的聲音. [Variety]: 大考驗!. [Subtitle]: 千千考你喔~. (2) [Subtitle]: 不要. (3) [Variety]: (被迫考驗). (4) [Logo]: 7-ELEVEN. [Subtitle]: 7. (5) [Subtitle]: 錯. (6) [Variety]: 聽起來很像啊. (7) [Logo]: FamilyMart. [Subtitle]: 全家. (8) [Subtitle]: 不是. (9) [Variety]: (到底是什麼). (10) [Logo]: Hi-Life. [Subtitle]: 萊爾富. (11) [Subtitle]: 對. (12) [Variety]: 居然猜對惹. (13) [Variety]: 這不是重播嗎?. [Subtitle]: 這跟剛有什麼不一樣. (14) [Logo]: 7-ELEVEN. [Subtitle]: 7. (15) [Subtitle]: 對. (16) [Variety]: 我有聽出差別!. [Subtitle]: 聲比較高一點. (17) [Logo]: FamilyMart. [Subtitle]: 全家. (18) [Variety]: 我在全家等你. (19) [Logo]: LINE. [Subtitle]: LINE. (20) [Subtitle]: 對. (21) [Variety]: 這個該不會... [Logo]: NOKIA. [Subtitle]: NOKIA嗎. (22) [Variety]: 時代的眼淚. [Subtitle]: 欸 等一下. (23) [Variety]: 居然是陷阱題. [Subtitle]: 這個太有年紀了吧. (24) [Variety]: 好像在哪裡聽過?. (25) [Subtitle]: 啊 啊 啊. [Logo]: 紅綠燈 指示燈. (26) [Subtitle]: 垃圾車. (27) [Variety]: 來帶我走?. (28) [Subtitle]: 進站 進站 進站. (29) [Subtitle]: 捷運要關門的聲音. (30) [Variety]: 這我有信心. (31) [Logo]: 高鐵即將開駛. [Subtitle]: 高鐵. (32) [Slogan]: 來試試看 你可以對幾題?.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator present throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair tied in a high bun (top-knot). She wears a white zip-up sweater/jacket with a small silver heart pin on the chest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A solid bright yellow wall dominates the background. To the left, a white shelving unit is partially visible with some items like a clock. The woman sits in a green mesh office chair.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female voice introducing a challenge. A bright, upbeat piano and percussion BGM track plays at a moderate tempo. (2) A short, electronic polyphonic jingle (7-11 door chime) triggers. The female voice guesses '7' quickly. (3) A loud 'buzzer' failure SFX plays. The female speaker expresses confusion with a rising pitch contour. (4) A melodic four-note chime (FamilyMart) plays. The speaker guesses 'FamilyMart' with high vocal arousal. (5) A sharp 'ding' success SFX plays. Laughter from a second female voice is heard in the background. (6) A high-pitched synthesized jingle (Hi-Life) plays. The speaker guesses correctly with an excited, loud delivery. (7) A soft, ascending digital notification chime (LINE) plays followed by a success SFX. (8) The iconic Nokia ringtone melody plays. The speaker laughs hysterically, her voice becoming slightly raspy from the high arousal. (9) A rapid, high-pitched mechanical beeping (Traffic light) plays. The speaker identifies it with quick speech rate. (10) A classical melody ('For Elise') played with a lo-fi electronic timbre (Garbage truck) plays. The speaker responds with a melodic tone. (11) A short, percussive electronic chirp (Metro gate) plays. The speaker shouts the answer. (12) A rhythmic, double-tone beep (Metro doors) plays. The speaker identifies it with confidence. (13) A professional, calm female recorded announcement with a chime (HSR) plays. The main speaker mimics the tone playfully. (14) The BGM swells as the speaker delivers a final high-arousal CTA in a friendly, rapid-fire style.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Question -> Answer/Reaction Loop -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by testing their familiarity with common everyday sounds found in Taiwan, leveraging cultural resonance and the creator's charismatic personality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features multiple competing brands in a quiz format, suggesting it is organic content rather than a specific paid partnership.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density social media content featuring popular Taiwanese influencer Chien Chien. The use of culturally specific audio triggers is designed to drive high engagement through nostalgia and local identity.
